about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I am a passionate Full-Stack Web Developer. My journey is rooted in a deep fascination with how technology can solve complex business problems while providing seamless, beautiful user experiences.

Currently pursuing my BS in Software Engineering, I am constantly expanding my theoretical knowledge and applying it to real-world, highly scalable applications. My focus allows me to bridge the gap between  enterprise solutions and modern, agile web ecosystems (React, Node, Flask).
Whether I'm architecting a robust PostgreSQL database, integrating complex APIs, or fine-tuning Framer Motion animations for a stunning UI, I treat every line of code as an opportunity to innovate.

hobby.title: Beyond the Code
hobby.description: When I'm not deploying apps or consulting, I compete at an elite level in esports. The quick decision-making and strategic planning from gaming directly translates to my development workflow.

items.title: Frontend Intern
items.description: At Technomites, I honed my skills as a Frontend Developer. My primary focus was on enhancing user interfaces and ensuring seamless user experiences for a diverse range of web applications. I contributed to the development of multiple client projects, working with modern frontend technologies to deliver high-quality web solutions.

items.title: Mern - Stack Intern
items.description: I began my journey as a MERN stack intern at TekScrum, where I was immersed in the world of full-stack development. My role involved working with MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, and Node.js, allowing me to gain hands-on experience in building modern web applications from the ground up.

items.title: Junior Full-Stack Developer
items.description: Working on real client-based projects, I am gaining hands-on experience in developing scalable and maintainable web applications. My responsibilities include building responsive user interfaces, implementing backend logic, and working with databases to deliver high-quality software solutions.

items.title: The HUB
items.description: A fully functional integrated application featuring complex arcade logic intertwined with robust e-commerce modules.

items.title: Organic Honey Store
items.description: A dynamic e-commerce web platform designed for selling premium organic honey, backed by a powerful database architecture.

items.title: Metito Utilities
items.description: A dynamic platform for Metito Utilities, providing seamless access to their services and information.

items.title: WEB - Designing
items.description: An intensive course diving deep into state-of-the-art web-designing tools and their integration into modern web applications.

items.title: Exploring Next Gen AI Automation Tools
items.description: An intensive workshop diving deep into state-of-the-art AI tools and their integration into modern automation workflows.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: I'm currently open to new opportunities in full-stack development. Let's build something amazing together.
